title: Command output is retained and re-rendered without bounds
reasoning: Every stream chunk and command result is appended to commandLog for the lifetime of the renderer session, and CommandPanel rebuilds the full output string on every render. A verbose review/fix/status command or several long sessions can grow memory usage and make unrelated UI updates increasingly expensive.
recommendation: Cap retained command log entries or bytes, add a clear-output action, and render output incrementally or memoize the formatted text so normal UI renders do not repeatedly format the entire history.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests exercise large command streams or repeated command output rendering.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a renderer test that sends many stream events and asserts the log is capped or trimmed according to the chosen retention policy.
minimumFixScope: Introduce a bounded command log policy in ClawpatchApp and avoid recomputing the full formatted output on every CommandPanel render.

history.reasoning: The original evidence no longer exists in the reported form. In src/renderer/src/routes/ClawpatchApp.tsx, stream/result/error appends now all route through appendCommandLogEntries, and that helper caps retained entries to MAX_COMMAND_LOG_ENTRIES = 200 via next.slice(-MAX_COMMAND_LOG_ENTRIES). In src/renderer/src/components/CommandPanel.tsx, formatted output is now wrapped in useMemo, so unrelated renders with the same entries/isRunning do not rebuild the full output string. A current regression test in test/renderer/ClawpatchApp.test.tsx named "retains only the latest command stream entries" sends 205 stream events and asserts chunk-4 is trimmed while chunk-5 and chunk-204 remain. I attempted to run the renderer test file, but the read-only sandbox prevented Vitest/Vite from creating node_modules/.vite-temp, so runtime verification was blocked by EPERM rather than a test failure.
commands: nl -ba src/renderer/src/routes/ClawpatchApp.tsx | sed -n '1,90p' && nl -ba src/renderer/src/routes/ClawpatchApp.tsx | sed -n '180,240p' && nl -ba src/renderer/src/routes/ClawpatchApp.tsx | sed -n '310,365p'
